Petition For Second Preliminary Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-16-2008 Granted Per Written Order

For Preliminary Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-10-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Panos Lagos appeared for Bill Sindona.

Mr. Lagos reported that the Inventory and Appraisal (I & A) was mailed to the court on Friday. The Petition for Preliminary Distribution was approved subject to receipt of the I & A. The order was signed and is to be held by the clerk until the Inventory and Appraisal is filed.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Laura Martinez CSR#11332. Bailiff: Rich Lee. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

For Preliminary Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-19-2007 Continued To Oct-10-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

For Preliminary Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-05-2007 Continued To Sep-19-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-09-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Davson Crawford appearing for petitioner Diana Rose Nelms. Court has returned Mr. Sindona's letter to him. Counsel has not seen the letter. Even though the letter is not objections in a form that the Court shall consider. Court will appoint the petitioner with bond. Counsel prefers to have full powers with bond. Petition is granted. Bond is fixed in the amount of $2,315,000.00 is required. Order signed.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: F. Smith.
